summary: Fase 4 MCP E2E Testing Complete - 42 tests passed, 1 skipped. All 3 new customer-facing agents (call_center, presupuestador_publico, seguimiento_publico) are correctly registered with proper scopes. Regression tests for Compras, Insurama, Logística, Finanzas, and legacy agents all pass.

minor.issue: Test was checking wrong collection (mcp_rate_limits instead of mcp_agent_limits) - FIXED
Missing REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL env var loading - FIXED by adding dotenv load

critical_code_review_comments: All 11 agents correctly registered in AGENTS dict (agent_defs.py line 597)
GET /api/agents/panel/overview returns all 11 agents with correct scopes
GET /api/agents correctly excludes visible_to_public=True agents (presupuestador_publico, seguimiento_publico)
call_center has scopes: customers:read, orders:read, comm:write, comm:escalate, meta:ping - NO finance/orders:write
presupuestador_publico has scopes: catalog:read, quotes:write_public, meta:ping - NO customers:read/orders:read
seguimiento_publico has scopes: public:track_by_token, meta:ping - ONLY public scope

All MCP tools registered in _registry: buscar_orden_por_cliente, obtener_historial_comunicacion, enviar_mensaje_portal, escalar_a_humano, consultar_catalogo_servicios, estimar_precio_reparacion, crear_presupuesto_publico, buscar_por_token, obtener_timeline_cliente, obtener_fotos_diagnostico
Idempotency working: enviar_mensaje_portal and crear_presupuesto_publico return deduped=true on second call
escalar_a_humano creates ticket in escalation_tickets + notifies admins
AuthError raised when agent lacks required scopes
Rate limits seeded in mcp_agent_limits: call_center 120/600, presupuestador_publico 60/300, seguimiento_publico 60/300
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing demo data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Fase 4 MCP agents fully tested. 3 new customer-facing agents: call_center (internal, visible in /api/agents), presupuestador_publico and seguimiento_publico (public, visible_to_public=True, excluded from /api/agents but included in /api/agents/panel/overview). All tools registered and working. Rate limits seeded in mcp_agent_limits collection. Public endpoint POST /api/public/agents/seguimiento/chat works without auth.

tests: kpi_analyst, auditor, supervisor_cola, iso_officer, finance_officer, gestor_siniestros, triador_averias, gestor_compras all present
